channel.title: Node.js on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Node.js on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Photo ZIP campaign targeting hospitality industry delivers Node.js implant for persistent access
item.description:
Microsoft Threat Intelligence reported an active multi-stage intrusion campaign targeting hospitality organizations in Europe and Asia. The attackers use photo-themed ZIP archives and fake image shortcut files to deploy a persistent Node.js implant and avoid detection.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: dotnet: Writing Node.js addons with .NET Native AOT
item.description:
Microsoft describes replacing a C++ Node.js addon with a C# implementation built with .NET Native AOT, removing the Python build dependency. The post explains how to create a Node.js native addon in C# using N-API, LibraryImport, and UnmanagedCallersOnly.

  • Source: .NET
